# Agustín Arenas — Full-Stack Developer

Last-Updated: 2026-06-08
Canonical: https://agustinarenas.vercel.app/
Language: en
Type: Personal portfolio

---

## About

I'm a Full-Stack Developer focused on solving real product problems with clean, scalable web solutions. Based in Argentina (Córdoba), I work across frontend and backend development with a strong focus on performance, maintainability, and user experience.

- **Role**: Full-Stack Developer
- **Experience**: 3+ years coding
- **Focus Areas**: Performance, maintainability, user experience
- **Location**: Córdoba, Argentina

---

## Skills & Technologies

### Languages & Core
- JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS

### Frontend
- React, Next.js, Astro
- Tailwind CSS, Sass, LESS, Bootstrap
- jQuery

### Backend
- Node.js, Express
- PHP, Laravel

### Databases
- MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB
- Sequelize (ORM)

### Other
- Git, Web3.js (NFT/smart contracts)

---

## Experience

### Full-Stack Developer — Dequo (January 2024 - Present)
Continuous improvement of Tiendaquick e-commerce product, focusing on:
- Frontend and backend feature development
- Performance optimization and SEO improvements
- Code refactoring for maintainability
- UI design quality enhancements
Tech: JavaScript, React, PHP, Laravel, MariaDB, LESS, Bootstrap

### Frontend Developer — Sellers Latam (March 2022 - January 2024)
- Maintenance and enhancements for Sellers Latam and Nuvex Uruguay websites
- Visual design and UI consistency improvements
- Tiendanube application scripts
Tech: JavaScript, React, Next.js, Sass, jQuery, Bootstrap

### Full-Stack Developer — Last Horde (February 2022 - July 2022)
- NFT card marketplace and e-commerce development
- Smart contract integration with Web3.js
- Backend API with Node.js, Express, Sequelize, MySQL
Tech: JavaScript, React, Web3.js, Node.js, Express, MySQL, Sass, Bootstrap

---

## Featured Projects

### Webdev Tools
A collection of useful tools for web developers.
Tech: TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS
URL: https://arenas-webtools.vercel.app/
GitHub: https://github.com/ArenasAgustin/webdev.tools

### Brain Games
Word puzzle game with 16 levels of encrypted word decoding.
Tech: TypeScript, Sass, React, Node.js, MongoDB
URL: https://brain-games.vercel.app/
GitHub: https://github.com/ArenasAgustin/brain-games

### Wave Music
Collaborative music platform with agile teamwork.
Tech: JavaScript, CSS, React, Node.js, MongoDB
GitHub: https://github.com/ArenasAgustin/Repo-para-PG

### Blackparadox Portfolio
Portfolio project for HTML, Sass, jQuery, Ajax, PHP practice.
Tech: PHP, HTML, Sass, JavaScript
GitHub: https://github.com/ArenasAgustin/blackparadox

### JS Benchmark Tool
Performance comparison tool for JavaScript code snippets.
Tech: JavaScript, HTML, CSS
URL: https://arenasagustin.github.io/benchmarck/
GitHub: https://github.com/ArenasAgustin/benchmarck

### Morse Decoder
Web application for Morse code translation.
Tech: JavaScript, React, Tailwind CSS
URL: https://morsetranslator.vercel.app/
GitHub: https://github.com/ArenasAgustin/morse

### Url Shortener
URL shortener with TypeScript, React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma.
Tech: TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL, Next.js
GitHub: https://github.com/ArenasAgustin/url-shortener

### Cinema
Cinema management app with CRUD for movies, genres, and users.
Tech: PHP, Laravel, Bootstrap, JavaScript, MySQL
GitHub: https://github.com/ArenasAgustin/cinema-app

## Technical Notes

- Built with Astro 5.x (static site generation)
- Tailwind CSS v4 with custom design tokens
- Deployed on Vercel
- Favicon: SVG-based with theme support
- Dark/light mode with prefers-color-scheme support
